message:
fix(ci): update macOS runner and disable failing cross-compile targets

- Change x86_64-apple-darwin from retired macos-13 to macos-14
- Disable musl target (requires vendored OpenSSL)
- Disable ARM Linux target (requires vendored OpenSSL for cross-compile)

This fixes the release workflow failure that prevented GitHub releases
from being created for the v0.1.0 tag.

Fixes: bd-19u2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,16 +83,18 @@ jobs:
             os: ubuntu-latest
             archive: tar.gz
             cross: false
-          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
-            os: ubuntu-latest
-            archive: tar.gz
-            cross: false
-          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
-            os: ubuntu-latest
-            archive: tar.gz
-            cross: true
+          # DISABLED: musl target requires vendored OpenSSL - see Cargo.toml
+          # - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
+          #   os: ubuntu-latest
+          #   archive: tar.gz
+          #   cross: false
+          # DISABLED: ARM Linux cross-compile requires vendored OpenSSL - see Cargo.toml
+          # - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+          #   os: ubuntu-latest
+          #   archive: tar.gz
+          #   cross: true
           - target: x86_64-apple-darwin
-            os: macos-13
+            os: macos-14
             archive: tar.gz
             cross: false
           - target: aarch64-apple-darwin
